## Summary

- Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Change Type

- [ ] FHIR artefact update
- [ ] Narrative documentation update
- [ ] Example or test asset update
- [ ] CI/CD or publication update
- [ ] Governance or decision record update

## Checklist

- [ ] British spelling has been used throughout.
- [ ] The one-repo architecture has been preserved.
- [ ] MY Core has been reused for generic resources where appropriate.
- [ ] New or changed profiles have matching examples.
- [ ] CapabilityStatements have been reviewed if interactions or profiles changed.
- [ ] Relevant workflow chapters and annexes have been updated.
- [ ] Provisional decisions are marked clearly.

## Notes for Reviewers

- List any open issues, design trade-offs, or items still to be confirmed.
